steps.title: Require a finite verb
steps.content: The blank is the main verb of the clause "MoMA ______ a vast collection of oil paintings." That clause needs a finite verb that can agree with the singular subject "MoMA."

steps.title: Reject nonfinite forms
steps.content: B and D are infinitive phrases, so neither can serve as the main verb of the clause. C is a participle and also cannot act as the clause's finite verb. The answer is A.
